case_title: CHARNEY, NANCY DR. VS SCOTT-FULLER, TAMMY DENISE

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,168.00 FILED BY CHARNEY, NANCY DR. AS TO DEFENDANT SCOTT-FULLER, TAMMY DENISE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-13-1993 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 05

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHARNEY, NANCY DR. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SCOTT-FULLER, TAMMY DENISE $3,168.00 PRINCIPAL, $15.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,183.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
